model_specification_line: smf.wls("full_time ~ daca_eligible + age_at_arrival + age_at_arrival_sq + age + sex_female + C(year) + C(state_fips) + driverslicenses + everify + securecommunities + lfpr + unemp", data=sample, weights=sample["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": sample["state_fips"]})
